subcodes.first_line: My inner and outer tongue beareth witness to the oneness of God and His singleness, to His might, His power and His sovereignty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یشهد لسان ظاهری و باطنی بوحدانیه الله و فردانیته و بقوته و قدرته و سلطانه و
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital
